evaluation.actual: Molly currently appears to meet criteria for F64.0 Gender Dysphoria. Other possible causes of apparent gender incongruence have been identified and excluded making Gender Dysphoria the appropriate diagnosis for this client. Molly meets criteria for F34.1 Persistent Depressive Disorder; in partial remission, F42.2 ObsessiveCompulsive Disorder, and F41.1 Generalized Anxiety Disorder.
